properties.text: auctionCallback must reject calls where msg.sender is not the stored auction contract.
properties.assertion: forall call auctionCallback(from, assetIn, amountIn, assetOut, amountOut, data): msg.sender == address(s_auction)

properties.text: auctionCallback must reject calls where from is not address(this).
properties.assertion: forall call auctionCallback(from, ...): from == address(this) OR revert

properties.text: _multiCall in auctionCallback must not allow transferring contract token balances to arbitrary addresses.
properties.assertion: forall solution in auctionCallback: no _call(target, data) where data encodes transfer(attacker, amount) on held tokens

properties.text: Solution _multiCall must not approve contract tokens to addresses other than the auction contract.
properties.assertion: forall _call in auctionCallback._multiCall: if target is ERC20 and data encodes approve(spender, amt) then spender == s_auction

properties.text: Reentrancy via _multiCall must not allow bid() to be re-entered during auctionCallback execution.
properties.assertion: forall bid() execution: no reentrant call to bid() via auctionCallback._multiCall path

properties.text: forceApprove amount in bid() no-solution path must equal getAssetOutAmount(assetIn, amount, block.timestamp).
properties.assertion: bid(assetIn, amount, []) => approvedAmount == getAssetOutAmount(assetIn, amount, block.timestamp)

properties.text: _multiCall targets must not include AuctionBidder itself to prevent self-callback reentrancy loops.
properties.assertion: forall call in _multiCall(calls): calls[i].target != address(this)

properties.text: forceApprove after _multiCall in auctionCallback must approve exact amountOut to msg.sender (auction).
properties.assertion: auctionCallback post-multiCall: forceApprove(msg.sender, amountOut) where msg.sender == s_auction

properties.text: Leftover assetOut after bid must be forwarded to receiver if receiver != address(0).
properties.assertion: post bid(): s_receiver != address(0) AND assetOutBalance > 0 => safeTransfer(s_receiver, assetOutBalance)

properties.text: If receiver is address(0), leftover assetOut tokens must remain in contract after bid.
properties.assertion: post bid(): s_receiver == address(0) => no safeTransfer of assetOut AND tokens remain in contract

properties.text: Failed external calls in _call must always revert, never return silently.
properties.assertion: forall _call(target, data): success == false => revert (never return empty)

properties.text: Empty calls array in _multiCall must revert with EmptyList().
properties.assertion: _multiCall(calls) where calls.length == 0 => revert EmptyList()

properties.text: returnData.length must equal calls.length on successful _multiCall completion.
properties.assertion: post _multiCall(calls): returnData.length == calls.length

properties.text: _call must forward exact calldata to target without modification.
properties.assertion: forall _call(target, data): target receives data unmodified

properties.text: Original revert reason from external call must be preserved when response.length > 0.
properties.assertion: _call: success == false AND response.length > 0 => revert(response) preserves original reason

properties.text: bid() must enforce AUCTION_BIDDER_ROLE and whenNotPaused before execution.
properties.assertion: pre bid(): hasRole(AUCTION_BIDDER_ROLE, msg.sender) AND !paused()

properties.text: auctionCallback must enforce whenNotPaused modifier.
properties.assertion: pre auctionCallback(): !paused()

properties.text: withdraw() must enforce DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE before execution.
properties.assertion: pre withdraw(): hasRole(DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE, msg.sender)

properties.text: withdraw() must reject address(0) as destination.
properties.assertion: pre withdraw(to, assetAmounts): to != address(0) OR revert InvalidZeroAddress()

properties.text: Stored auction address must implement IBaseAuction verified via ERC-165 supportsInterface.
properties.assertion: s_auction.supportsInterface(type(IBaseAuction).interfaceId) == true at set time

properties.text: _setAuction must reject zero address, non-IBaseAuction, and duplicate address.
properties.assertion: _setAuction(a): a != 0 AND a.supportsInterface(IBaseAuction) AND a != s_auction

properties.text: _setReceiver must reject duplicate receiver address.
properties.assertion: _setReceiver(r): r != s_receiver OR revert ValueNotUpdated()

properties.text: Receiver can be set to address(0) to disable token forwarding after bid.
properties.assertion: _setReceiver(address(0)) succeeds AND disables post-bid token forwarding

properties.text: Changing auction via _setAuction must not leave stale token approvals to the old auction contract.
properties.assertion: post _setAuction(newAuction): allowance(address(this), oldAuction) == 0 for all tokens

properties.text: Contract must advertise IAuctionCallback support via ERC-165 supportsInterface.
properties.assertion: supportsInterface(type(IAuctionCallback).interfaceId) == true

properties.text: All _multiCall calls must execute sequentially in order 0..calls.length-1.
properties.assertion: _multiCall(calls): execution order is calls[0], calls[1], ..., calls[n-1] strictly sequential

properties.text: If any _call in _multiCall reverts, entire _multiCall must revert with no partial execution returned.
properties.assertion: _multiCall: any _call revert => entire multiCall reverts (atomic)

properties.text: Solution with non-empty data must be abi.encoded as Call[] before passing to _multiCall.
properties.assertion: auctionCallback: calls = abi.decode(data, (Call[])) must succeed or revert

properties.text: No-solution bid path must use forceApprove to set exact approval without residual allowance from prior bids.
properties.assertion: bid(solution=[]) => forceApprove resets to 0 then sets getAssetOutAmount, no residual allowance
